metadata.description: 26 Claude Code skills covering the complete software development lifecycle — plan, build, review, test, deploy, and hand off.

plugins.name: vibe-add-feature
plugins.description: Full spec-driven workflow for adding a feature to an existing codebase with an AI coding agent. Triggers on "feature:" prefix, "I want to add a feature", "add X to my project", "new feature", "build a feature for". Always use when adding functionality to an existing project — even without the exact prefix.

plugins.name: vibe-agent
plugins.description: Standalone agentic architecture skill. Designs complete multi-agent AI systems from scratch — no other vibe-* skills required. Produces AGENT_ARCH.md covering pattern selection, agent roles, tool mapping, state design, HITL checkpoints.

plugins.name: vibe-architect
plugins.description: Architecture planning workflow for establishing code structure, patterns, and principles before any code is written. Runs after brainstorm: and before new: on every project.

plugins.name: vibe-brainstorm
plugins.description: Comprehensive brainstorming workflow for turning any app idea into a clear, validated, buildable brief. Two paths: personal project (8 steps) and client/business project (13 steps).

plugins.name: vibe-change-spec
plugins.description: Scope change workflow for modifying, adding, or removing requirements at any point during a build. Handles new additions, removals, renames, backlog operations, and reverting previous changes.

plugins.name: vibe-changelog
plugins.description: Generates and maintains two changelog files from git tags, TASKS.md, DECISIONS.md, and feature folders. CHANGELOG.md is developer-facing; CHANGELOG_CLIENT.md is plain English.

plugins.name: vibe-cost
plugins.description: Tracks and reports token usage and dollar cost across every level of a vibe-* project — per task, per session, per feature, per phase, and total project spend.

plugins.name: vibe-deploy
plugins.description: Prepares a vibe-* project for deployment to 7 platforms: Railway, Render, Fly.io, Heroku, Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages. Detects stack automatically and patches source files.

plugins.name: vibe-design-md
plugins.description: Generates a DESIGN.md file for any website URL or fetches a pre-built one from the awesome-design-md collection (55+ sites).

plugins.name: vibe-design
plugins.description: Frontend design workflow that produces non-generic, editorial-quality UI. Reads DESIGN.md for exact brand tokens.

plugins.name: vibe-doctor
plugins.description: Environment health check and auto-remediation for vibe-* projects. Checks node_modules drift, Tailwind mismatches, dotenv load order, and more.

plugins.name: vibe-document
plugins.description: Generates complete documentation for vibe-* projects — inline code docs, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, API reference, and component library docs.

plugins.name: vibe-e2e
plugins.description: Generates and runs full end-to-end UI tests using Playwright against a live URL. Auto-installs Playwright. Video on failure. Cleanup script removes test data.

plugins.name: vibe-fix-bug
plugins.description: Full spec-driven workflow for diagnosing and fixing a bug with an AI coding agent. Three-way severity triage: trivial, environment, and significant bugs.

plugins.name: vibe-graph
plugins.description: Dual-layer dependency graph for vibe-* projects. DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.json maps file-level relationships. CONCEPT_GRAPH.json maps semantic relationships.

plugins.name: vibe-handoff
plugins.description: Generates complete handoff packages for every transition scenario. Five modes: client, milestone, dev, internal, maintenance. Produces MD files plus a self-contained HTML portal.

plugins.name: vibe-init
plugins.description: Onboards an existing or legacy codebase into the vibe-* skills framework. Reads actual source files, infers architecture, generates the full vibe/ folder.

plugins.name: vibe-ledger
plugins.description: Generates a full project cost report as a self-contained HTML file from vibe/cost/history.json. Opens automatically in the browser.

plugins.name: vibe-mode
plugins.description: Sets the execution mode for the vibe-* framework — manual or autonomous. Writes VIBE_MODE to CLAUDE.md. All vibe-* skills read this on startup.

plugins.name: vibe-new-app
plugins.description: Full spec-driven setup workflow for building a brand new app from scratch with an AI coding agent. Generates CLAUDE.md and the complete vibe/ folder.

plugins.name: vibe-parallel
plugins.description: Parallel task execution using Claude Code subagents. Reads task files, builds dependency waves, detects conflicts, and spawns tasks as parallel subagents.

plugins.name: vibe-perf
plugins.description: Full-stack performance audit for vibe-* projects — frontend, backend, agentic pipelines, and infrastructure. Risk-ranked fix plan.

plugins.name: vibe-progress
plugins.description: Displays a live ASCII progress dashboard for the current vibe project. Reads TASKS.md and git log. Read-only, no files modified.

plugins.name: vibe-review
plugins.description: Evidence-based code review skill — mandatory gate after every phase completes. Every finding backed by file path and line number. No vague feedback.

plugins.name: vibe-spec-review
plugins.description: Spec quality gate — audits planning documents before any code is written. Triggered automatically by vibe-brainstorm, vibe-agent, vibe-new-app, vibe-init.

plugins.name: vibe-test
plugins.description: Blast-radius-aware test generation for vibe-* projects. Traces every file a change touches, maps the full dependency graph, writes complete test coverage.
